text:
Building with @roam  for our AI operations workflow at Hawaii Coastal Property Management.

We use it to run Clara, our AI ops assistant, so she can route alerts, keep the team updated, and help move daily ops faster.

Excited to keep building with @roam!
name: Flory May Reyes

text:
Most property management teams looking at AI think the gap is tooling.

The actual gap is earlier than that. It's how data enters the workflow.

Inspection findings are the clearest example.
name: SolWise - RE & PM

text: Two seed rounds closed yesterday: Rely, an AI that runs multifamily real estate diligence, and a voice AI for construction-site comms. Capital has left the general chatbot. The next wave of AI startups won't assist a workflow. They'll be the workflow.
name: Vikas Malpani|AI Transactions for US Real Estate
